data.title: Planet Lunch News
U.S. President Trump Highlights America's Leadership in Cryptocurrency
data.description: According to Foresight News, U.S. President Donald Trump recently expressed on Truth Social that the United States holds a leading position in the fields of cryptocurrency and Bitcoin. He emphasized the country's commitment to maintaining this advantage.

data.title: Backpack Exchange completed the distribution of 10 million points in the ninth week of the first season, and many core indicators hit new historical highs
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Backpack Exchange completed the ninth week of the first season today, with a total of 10 million points issued. The platform's business data continued to rise, setting a new record: 24-hour perpetual contract trading volume exceeded US$1.1 billion; total loan assets exceeded US$165 million; total borrowed assets exceeded US$56 million.
The current season has entered its last week. According to CEO Armani's Twitter announcement, the platform will usher in a series of major updates after the season ends, including opening more regional services, launching new products, listing new tokens, and releasing new technologies.

data.title: BitMart Futures will list BUSDT
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BitMart contract will launch BUSDT.
According to the official announcement, BitMart contract will launch BUSDT perpetual contract at 15:00 (UTC+8) on May 23, 2025.
B (BUILDon) is a full-chain smart investment platform. B is based on the A2A (Agent-to-Agent) architecture, and realizes the automation of the overall research and investment cycle through on-chain data insights, asset analysis and personalized strategies.

data.title: Crypto asset management company Blockrise completes 2 million euro seed round of financing
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Blockrise, a crypto asset management company headquartered in Rotterdam, announced the completion of a 2 million euro seed round of financing, with Golden Egg Check Capital participating. The new funds are intended to be used to prepare for the implementation of the European crypto asset market regulatory regulations and strive to obtain the MiCAR license for crypto asset market supervision issued by the Netherlands Authority for Financial Markets (AFM). The company expects to launch a round A financing at the end of the year and expand its Bitcoin custody and asset management platform.

data.title: US auto tariffs turned into a national crisis for Japan, prompting trade talks
data.description:
Japan’s top tariff negotiator Ryosei Akazawa plans to return to the United States on May 30 for a fourth round of trade talks. This trip follows the coming weekend’s third round in Washington, involving Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick and U. S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer. The talks aim to address deep divisions over U. S. auto and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-auto-tariffs-national-crisis-japan/

data.title: Trendspotting in crypto: How to discover winning projects before the crowd
data.description:
TL;DRSpotting the next big crypto project before it explodes demands data, discipline and a sharp eye for real signals. This guide explores how to identify early winners by analyzing onchain metrics, tokenomics, dev activity and community traction while avoiding the common traps of hype-driven pumps and red-flag projects. Despite the crypto space being crowded, fast-moving and full of noise, some investors manage to consistently find promising projects while they’re still under the radar. So, how do they do it? Crypto trendspotters know how to read onchain data
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/trendspotting-in-crypto?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: XRP News: Volatility Shares Lists First-Ever XRP Futures ETF on Nasdaq Under Ticker ‘XRPI’
data.description: Key Takeaways:XRPI, the first U.S. XRP futures ETF, began trading on Nasdaq with a 0.94% net expense ratio.The fund allocates 80%+ to XRP futures and related ETPs.A leveraged 2x version is in development, following strong demand for Teucrium’s XXRP.Analysts say this could pave the way for broader institutional adoption of XRP.First U.S. XRP Futures ETF Launches on Nasdaq — Is Institutional Demand Heating Up?XRP just took a major step toward Wall Street legitimacy as Volatility Shares launched the first U.S.-based exchange-traded fund (ETF) tracking XRP futures on a 1:1 basis. Trading under the ticker XRPI on Nasdaq, the fund aims to provide regulated exposure to XRP futures — a move expected to attract institutional investors and trigger renewed interest in XRP markets.The fund will allocate at least 80% of its assets to XRP futures contracts and XRP-linked exchange-traded products (ETPs). The ETF’s net expense ratio is 0.94%, with a gross expense of 1.15%, according to its official prospectus.XRP ETF Details: Fees, Structure & What’s NextVolatility Shares is positioning XRPI as a non-leveraged, futures-based ETF, aiming to capture XRP’s performance without direct token exposure. According to the fund documentation:Ticker: XRPIExchange: NasdaqNet Expense Ratio: 0.94%Gross Expense Ratio: 1.15%Portfolio Composition: 80%+ XRP futures & XRP-linked ETPsA leveraged 2x XRP futures ETF is also in the pipeline, joining Teucrium’s XXRP, which launched in April and has already attracted $121 million AUM — a sign analysts interpret as strong demand for XRP-related institutional products.Institutional Demand for XRP Funds GrowsBloomberg senior ETF analyst Eric Balchunas called the early success of XXRP a “good signal” for XRPI’s future, noting that the crypto ETF space is evolving beyond Bitcoin and Ethereum. While spot XRP ETFs are still under review by the SEC, the launch of futures-based products may be a precursor to full market integration.These developments align with recent macro trends:XRP’s settlement with the SECGrowing open interest in XRP futuresRising demand for diversified crypto ETFsWhat This Means for XRP Price & Crypto ETF LandscapeThe XRPI launch could:Provide regulated on-ramps for institutional exposure to XRPIncrease derivatives market activity, affecting spot prices indirectlyAccelerate SEC review pressure for spot XRP ETF approvalStrengthen XRP’s E-E-A-T profile in traditional financial circlesWith over $2.2 billion already locked in XRP futures, the XRPI listing may push further capital toward XRP — especially if leveraged versions like the upcoming 2x ETF gain traction. Expert Take:“A futures-based XRP ETF on Nasdaq gives institutional investors a compliant way to gain XRP exposure, potentially unlocking a new wave of interest if performance follows.”— Eric Balchunas, Bloomberg

data.title: Solana News: Solana Price Pattern Signals $260 Rally — But $180 Resistance Stands in the Way
data.description: Key Takeaways:Solana is forming a bull flag with a $260 breakout target.$180 resistance is the critical level to watch — without volume, the move may fail.Fractals and hidden divergences point to even higher targets ($260–$450).Failure to flip $180 may push SOL back to $140–$150 support.Solana Price Eyes Breakout as Bull Flag Fractal Predicts $260 SurgeSolana (SOL) is flashing bullish signals on the daily chart, but analysts agree that one key level — $180 — must flip to support before a breakout to $260 becomes viable.Currently trading around $182.93, SOL is testing overhead resistance for the second consecutive week. As Bitcoin (BTC) trades near its all-time high of $110,857, traders are betting on a potential capital rotation into altcoins, with Solana as a top candidate.Technical Setup: Bull Flag in FocusSolana’s price structure is forming a classic bull flag pattern, often seen as a continuation signal in strong uptrends. Here’s how the current chart breaks down:Current Price: $182.93Immediate Resistance: $180 (needs a daily close above)Short-Term Targets: $200 and $220Bull Flag Target: $260RSI: 64.3 — bullish, but not overboughtHowever, analysts are urging caution: trading volume has decreased during this consolidation phase, which may stall a breakout without renewed buying pressure.What Analysts Say: Fractals, Divergences, and Key ZonesPrice Fractal Points to $260Crypto trader Robert Mercer compared Solana’s current setup to the October 2024 breakout, when SOL surged past $180 and rallied to $260. He sees a similar fractal forming now, suggesting a breakout could repeat the pattern.Hidden Bullish Divergence Could Target $450Technical analyst Javon Marks highlighted a hidden bullish divergence on the 3-day chart — the same setup that triggered a 1,332% rally in 2024. If confirmed again, Marks sees a potential upside to $450 in 2025.Trader Sentiment: Wait for ConfirmationPopular trader XO is watching the $180 level closely. He advises waiting until SOL flips $180 into confirmed support before opening a long position.What Could Invalidate the Bullish Scenario?If Solana fails to decisively break above $180, analysts warn of a potential pullback to the $140–$150 range — a daily order block expected to offer higher-timeframe support. A breakdown here would invalidate the bull flag structure and delay the bullish continuation.

data.title: Chairman of the China-Britain Business Council calls on the US government to act rationally and get out of the tariff war quagmire
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The 2025 Global Trade and Investment Promotion Summit was held in Beijing. Sir Anthony Culbertson, Chairman of the China-Britain Business Council, was interviewed on the spot. Sir Anthony Culbertson said that he sincerely hoped that the US government would listen to the voice of the market, act rationally and negotiate in a friendly manner to get out of the current quagmire of the tariff war. (Jinshi)

data.title: SOON releases token economics: initial total supply is 1 billion, 51% allocated to the community
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News SOON released token economics, with an initial total supply of 1 billion SOON (annual inflation rate of 3%). The initial launch chains include Solana, BNB Chain and Base. The utility functions of the token are governance rights, native assets, builder rewards, and fast finality security based on staking.
Among them: 51% is allocated to the community; 25% is allocated to the ecosystem; 8% is allocated to airdrops/liquidity; 6% is allocated to the foundation/treasury; 10% is allocated to the team and co-builders.
